name: Joko Widodo
description: 7th President of Indonesia (2014-2024), former Mayor of Solo and Governor of Jakarta

name: Gibran Rakabuming
description: Vice President of Indonesia (2024-present), former Mayor of Solo, eldest son of Jokowi

name: Kaesang Pangarep
description: Chairman of PSI (2022-2024), youngest son of Jokowi, entrepreneur

name: PSI
description: Partai Solidaritas Indonesia - political party closely associated with Jokowi's political circle

name: Bahlil Lahadalia
description: Minister of Energy and Mineral Resources, Golkar politician allied with Jokowi

name: Listyo Sigit Prabowo
description: Chief of Indonesian National Police (2021-2024), appointed by Jokowi

name: Prabowo Subianto
description: 8th President of Indonesia (2024-present), former military general, former son-in-law of Suharto

name: Gerindra
description: Partai Gerakan Indonesia Raya - political party founded and chaired by Prabowo Subianto

name: Hashim Djojohadikusumo
description: Billionaire businessman, younger brother of Prabowo, key financial backer

name: Didit Hediprasetyo
description: Fashion designer, son of Prabowo Subianto
